cannot_assert: Biological replication, causality, or trajectory cannot be inferred from this single demonstration dataset.
confirmed: The plotted coordinates are the Seurat UMAP embedding and colour maps the exported cell_type annotation.
interpretable: Nine annotated cell groups are distinguishable by colour and direct labels.
recommendation: Keep as the print-safe baseline UMAP view.
visible: All labels, points, title, subtitle, and axes are visible without clipping in both render sizes.
